purpose: Report-only continuity and dependency sentinel for preserving open points, follow-ups, review_required items, blocked tasks, dependency chains, required next files, affected registers, and logical next steps across WellFit agent/governance tasks. It does not create tasks, rewrite files, approve PRs, merge, repair, deploy, or modify runtime product code.

openPointSchema.title: short human title
openPointSchema.source: existing file that introduced or owns the point
openPointSchema.ownerAgent: agent or governance framework responsible for continuing it
openPointSchema.affectedRegisters: registers that should be checked when resolving the point
openPointSchema.requiredOutputLocations: array of output location objects with path, existsNow, purpose
openPointSchema.nextRecommendedTask: concrete next action for the next agent

followUpSchema.fromEntryId: continuity map entry that created the follow-up
followUpSchema.targetRegister: existing register or TODO file to update

dependencySchema.evidenceRequired: file/report/check proving the dependency is satisfied

mustNotForgetRules: Every mustNotForget entry must include a concrete nextRecommendedTask.
Every mustNotForget entry must name affectedRegisters and requiredOutputLocations.
Future agents must check this map before closing governance/framework tasks.
Do not mark entries done unless the referenced outputs and work/progress evidence exist.
Before creating a new agent name, role, register, workflow family, or execution authority, apply the Agent Extension Policy and preserve proposal-required open points for human review.
reviewRequiredRules: review_required and human_review_required entries require reason and humanReviewRequired=true unless explicitly documented as device-only evidence.
Review-required items must be preserved in handoffs and not silently downgraded.
Protected topics and automation activation remain review-gated.
Agent capabilities that overlap two or more existing agents or touch protected/high-risk scope require a new-agent proposal and human review before implementation.
blockedRules: blocked entries require reason, blocking dependency type, and nextRecommendedTask.
Blocked automation entries must keep blocks_auto_merge, blocks_auto_repair, or blocks_batch_execution dependencies as applicable.
Blocked status is not a failure; it is a preserved stop condition.
nextAgentHandoffRules: Read AGENTS.md, CURRENT_PROJECT_STATE.md, WORK_MAP.md, TODO_INDEX.md, NEXT_ACTIONS.md, then this map before new governance work.
Use entries to update existing agent-task-queue, work-log, progress-log, product-readiness, repository-inventory, and cross-reference files instead of creating parallel systems.
When a task resolves an entry, update this map in the same PR and cite the output evidence.
When a task creates a new framework, add machine-readable backlog/status/output dependencies here.

requiredOutputLocations.purpose: Machine-readable existing agent/framework catalog.
Machine-readable approved future agent/framework backlog.
Human-readable catalog/backlog governance runbook.
Report-only validator for catalog/backlog readiness.

forbiddenAutoUpdates: never modify Unity or PR #13 assets
humanReviewRequiredFor: changing auto-merge or auto-repair from report-only
new agent proposal or extension with ambiguous ownership per agent-extension-policy
